title: TikTok Search Scraper
description: Search TikTok videos by keyword, hashtag, topic, product, brand, or creator niche.

keywords.title: Search Keywords
keywords.description: Keyword, hashtag, product, brand, topic, or creator niche to search for in TikTok videos. You can also provide query instead when calling the actor API.

query.title: Search Query Alias
query.description: Optional alias for Search Keywords for API callers. Ignored when Search Keywords is provided.

region.title: Region
region.description: Optional country or region code, such as US, GB, JP, or DE.

count.title: Results Per Page
count.description: Number of video results to return from this page. Scrappa accepts 1-50.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous run. Leave empty for the first page.

publish_time.title: Publish Time Filter
publish_time.description: Optional upstream publish-time filter. Leave empty to use TikTok's default search window; broad values can behave like no filter if TikTok has no matching retained results.

sort_type.title: Sort Type
sort_type.description: Optional upstream sort type. Leave empty to use TikTok's default ranking.
